revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"

revision.text:
<includeonly>
{{Hidden category}}
{{Wikipedia category}}
{{Progress box|{{Monthly clean-up category/name part|{{PAGENAME}}}}|float=right}}
This category combines all "{{Monthly clean-up category/name part|{{PAGENAME}}}}"-tagged articles from {{Monthly clean-up category/monthname|{{PAGENAME}}}} {{{year|{{title year}}}}} to enable us to work through the backlog more systematically. It is a member of [[:Category:{{Monthly clean-up category/name part|{{PAGENAME}}}}]].

[[Category:{{Monthly clean-up category/name part|{{PAGENAME}}}}| {{{year|{{title year}}}}}-{{{monthno|{{Monthly clean-up category/monthno|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]]
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>
{{Hidden category}}
{{Wikipedia category}}
{{Progress box|{{Monthly clean-up category/name part|{{PAGENAME}}}}|float=right}}
This category combines all "{{Monthly clean-up category/name part|{{PAGENAME}}}}"-tagged articles from {{Monthly clean-up category/monthname|{{PAGENAME}}}} {{{year|{{title year}}}}} to enable us to work through the backlog more systematically. It is a member of [[:Category:{{Monthly clean-up category/name part|{{PAGENAME}}}}]].

[[Category:{{Monthly clean-up category/name part|{{PAGENAME}}}}| {{{year|{{title year}}}}}-{{{monthno|{{Monthly clean-up category/monthno|{{PAGENAME}}}}}}}]]
</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23410164509|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=English_variant_category here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=English_variant_category for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] -->

{{Hidden category}}
{{Wikipedia category}}
{{Progress box|{{Monthly clean-up category/name part|{{PAGENAME}}}}|float=right}}
This category combines all "{{Monthly clean-up category/name part|{{PAGENAME}}}}"-tagged articles from {{Monthly clean-up category/monthname|{{PAGENAME}}}} {{{year|{{title year}}}}} to enable us to work through the backlog more systematically. It is a member of [[:Category:{{Monthly clean-up category/name part|{{PAGENAME}}}}]].

</includeonly><noinclude>
{{documentation}}
